text: Data from many fields of science have become manageable for data-intensive analyses by being stored and indexed in online databases. In this paper we describe the Open Machine Learning platform, OpenML, a repository where machine learning researchers can share and link their experimental outcomes in exquisite detail. OpenML increases the speed, visibility and globalness of the development of data analysis methods in machine learning and facilitates progress towards very large-scale analyses of data. We describe OpenML and its potential contributions to network science as well as its direct benefits for machine learning as a research, educational and technological field.
